name: coODAbortTransfer
title: coODAbortTransfer
syntax: void coODAbortTransfer( dword abortCode, dword errCode[] );
description: The function aborts a SDO transfer, which was initiated on an object with access type 7. It can be used in the event functions coOnDownloadIndication or coOnUploadIndication.

parameters.name: abortCode
parameters.description: Abort code of the SDO transfer (see /3/ or coOnError under error class 3, except 0xFF01...)
